title: Contact
content:
For program, partnership, contribution, evaluation, grant request, advisory board, and general inquiries.

Contact Us

The Foundation welcomes conversations with healthcare professionals, veterinary professionals, educators, manufacturers, distributors, farms, shelters, community organizations, accredited education providers, donors, and mission-aligned partners interested in advancing One Health education, veterinary diagnostic literacy, infectious disease preparedness, and access to reliable care.

Interested in the Evaluation Program? Use the program intake form for faster routing.

Interested in equipment or supply grant support? Visit the Access, Affordability & Equipment Grant Program page.

Interested in advisory board service? Visit the Advisory Board application page.

General Inquiries

Sonia Touby
Executive Director

Email: SoniaTouby@aesculapiusfoundation.org

Program and Partnership Inquiries

Please contact us if you are interested in educational programming, infectious disease preparedness initiatives, professional development, veterinary diagnostic education, independent evaluation and product evaluation work, access and affordability support, or mission-aligned collaborations.

Educational Purpose

The Aesculapius Foundation provides educational resources and does not provide medical or veterinary diagnosis, treatment, or individualized clinical advice.
